title: lidbeckia americana
intro: Lidbeckia americana, also known as American Lidbeckia, is a flowering plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as fight off infections. The health benefits of Lidbeckia americana include its potential to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and promote wound healing. Lidbeckia americana is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
